_publications._publicationTitle: Neuregulin-1 beta and neuregulin-1 alpha differentially affect the migration and invasion of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cells.

_contextSnippet: 1 nM NRG-1β markedly enhanced ST88-14 migration on poly-L-lysine/laminin (Fig. 2 E), suggesting that poly-L-lysine and/or laminin act cooperatively with NRG-1β to promote MPNST cell migration
details: NRG-1β at 1 nM maximally enhanced migration on poly-L-lysine/laminin substrate, with modest enhancement on collagen type I and no effect on fibronectin
